hero.title: Every project tells a story of efficiency achieved.
hero.body: Real cases from companies and homes in the Canary Islands that have transformed their energy model with us.

projects.title: Hotel Las Palmas — 45% energy reduction
projects.excerpt: 200 kWp photovoltaic installation with storage system for a four-star hotel in Gran Canaria.

projects.title: Finca La Palma — Agricultural self-consumption
projects.excerpt: Photovoltaic self-consumption system for an 80-hectare agricultural estate in La Palma.

projects.title: Industrial warehouse Tenerife — 120 kWp
projects.excerpt: Rooftop industrial installation with real-time monitoring and preventive maintenance contract.

testimonial.quote: The team did not just install our renewable energy system from day one. They solved a real problem for us.
testimonial.name: Roberto Martinez

stats.title: Results that speak for themselves
stats.body: Every installation we complete demonstrates the real impact renewable energy can have on the finances of a Canarian company or home.

cta.title: Request your free audit
cta.body: Discover how to optimize your consumption and move toward a more efficient energy model adapted to your company. No cost. No commitment. No waiting.
